creator: pgj@FreeBSD.org
text:
In my opinion Question 4.7.1. ``What other devices does FreeBSD
	support?'' should be removed from the FreeBSD FAQ, because it relies
	on an old section of the Handbook (``Miscellaneous Devices''), and
	without that it has no more sense. However, I proposed the remove
	this question and answer in my patch, but if anybody has a better
	idea (like there is an answer for that question somewhere else)
	then it should simply updated.
